---
name: Bug report
about: An error in a verifier, schema, example, fixture, or document
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What is wrong

A clear description of the error. Name the affected file, section, schema, or
fixture.

## Where

- File or document:
- Section or schema field:
- Profile version:

## Expected

What the document, schema, or verifier should do or say.

## Actual

What it does or says now.

## Reproduction

For a verifier or tooling bug, the exact command and input. For a document
error, a quote of the affected text.

## Notes

Anything else that helps, such as related sections that may also be affected.

---

Do not use this template to report a security weakness. See SECURITY.md.
